description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a steeply pitched red gable roof and black horizontal siding. The front facade is dominated by a large, natural wood double door with black metal hinges, giving it a rustic appearance. The side view reveals a row of three rectangular windows with wooden frames, providing natural light to the interior. The rear of the house is open, supported by wooden beams and posts, creating a sheltered area that could serve as a carport or covered patio. The base of the house is finished with a brick foundation, adding stability and a touch of traditional charm. The overall design is functional and unadorned, suitable for suburban or rural settings.
description: A rustic, single-story house with a red gable roof, black siding, large wooden doors, and a partially open rear supported by wooden beams.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large wooden double door with black hinges set in black horizontal siding beneath a red gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view displays three rectangular windows with wooden frames and the full height of the red gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals an open structure supported by wooden beams, exposing the interior and creating a sheltered area.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlights the red gable roof and the symmetrical, rectangular footprint of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Large double wooden doors with black metal hinges, no porch or steps, simple and functional entry.
